triage_rows.direction: watch this layer when you care about governance friction changing even if the incumbent symbol itself has not rotated.
treat tension-state changes as a separate escalation path from direct focus rotation signals.
promote p1 tension changes upward; keep p2/p3 tension changes in review-aware polling.

interpretation: This signal separates governance friction changes from direct focus swaps.
It helps avoid conflating 'the focus changed' with 'the policy around the focus became unstable'.
